title: Clockwork: Horizons
description: Build sprawling Create factories, engineer autonomous clockwork machines, and take to the skies with fully functional Valkyrien Skies, Create: Clockwork, or Warium Aircraft / airships.
body:
# **⚙️ Clockwork Horizons**
# 


## 🧭 Overview

Clockwork Horizons is a sandbox engineering and exploration modpack that combines the creativity of Create, the physics and flight of Valkyrien Skies, and the intricate mechanisms of Clockwork.
This is a world of brass, gears, and skybound invention — where your machines don’t just function, **_they fly_**.

Whether you want to **build massive kinetic factories**, craft a**utomated clockwork contraptions**, or **construct physically simulated airships that soar through the clouds**, Clockwork Horizons gives you the tools and freedom to engineer your own destiny.


## 🏗️ What This Modpack Adds

**Create Mod & Add-ons –** expand your industry with mechanical power, rotational energy, and modular factories. Includes popular add-ons like Create: Steam 'n Rails, Create: Crafts & Additions, and Create: Big Cannons.

**Valkyrien Skies 2 –** experience true physics-based flight. Build functional ships and airships that obey gravity, thrust, and momentum.

**Clockwork & Steampunk Expansion –** introduce intricate automata, precision mechanisms, and time-based technologies that mesh beautifully with Create’s kinetic systems.

**Exploration & Progression Mods –** new biomes, dungeons, and tech tiers to explore, ensuring there’s always something new beyond the horizon.

**Performance & Utility Enhancements –** optimized configs and lightweight helpers to keep large factories and physics systems running smoothly.


## ⚡ Features

**Mechanical Innovation –** design fully functional factories powered by rotational energy.

**Flying Machines & Airships –** construct airworthy vessels that obey real physics.

**Clockwork Automation –** create automata, gear-driven contraptions, and precision mechanisms.

**Sandbox Freedom –** no forced questlines; explore and invent at your own pace.

**Steampunk Aesthetic –** rich brass textures, detailed machinery, and immersive visuals.

**Multiplayer-Ready –** balanced performance and server configs for cooperative play.


## 🌤️ Why You’ll Love It

**Clockwork Horizons is perfect for players who love to:**
- Engineer complex, visually stunning machines
- Explore immersive worlds full of mechanical potential
- Build skyports, airships, and industrial cities that actually move
- Combine creativity, logic, and aesthetics into one evolving world

**This isn’t just a modpack —** it’s a mechanical renaissance in the sky.
_Build. Automate. Ascend._ ⚙️


## 🧰 Technical Info
## 
Minecraft: 1.20.1

Loader: Forge

Recommended RAM: 6–8 GB minimum

Optimized for: Singleplayer and small multiplayer servers
